scripts.dev: npx kill-port 3010 2>/dev/null || true; npx next dev --port 3010 --hostname 127.0.0.1
scripts.dev:turbo: npx kill-port 3010 2>/dev/null || true; npx next dev --turbopack --port 3010 --hostname 127.0.0.1
scripts.dev:clean: npx kill-port 3010 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf .next; npx next dev --port 3010 --hostname 127.0.0.1
